title: CozyDefault
description: A simple, chill-themed default edit pack made for both PvP and SMP
body:
# Chill Default Edit Pack

A relaxed default edit made for both PvP and SMP.  
It keeps the vanilla feel while adding smoother, cleaner visuals that are easy on the eyes.  

## Features
- Clearer textures for PvP  
- Comfortable for long SMP sessions  
- Stays close to vanilla style  

## Perfect For
Players who want a balanced, minimal pack that feels fresh without straying from the original game.
